MANOSABA-MAJOKA_POWER.title: Majoka
MANOSABA-MAJOKA_POWER.description: Gain bonus attack damage as Majoka rises. Past one hundred, something very bad happens...
MANOSABA-MAJOKA_POWER.smartDescription: Gain bonus attack damage as Majoka rises.
MANOSABA-MURDEROUS_IMPULSE_POWER.title: Murderous Impulse
MANOSABA-MURDEROUS_IMPULSE_POWER.descrip: When you play an Attack, deal random damage to an ally. Stacks increase the damage dealt.
MANOSABA-MURDEROUS_IMPULSE_POWER.smartDe: When you play an Attack, deal random damage to an ally. Stacks increase the damage dealt.
MANOSABA-LABOURS_OF_HIRO_POWER.title: Labours of Hiro
MANOSABA-LABOURS_OF_HIRO_POWER.descripti: Whenever anyone plays an Attack card, the holder gains [gold]Majoka[/gold] equal to 10x [gold]Energy[/gold] spent. You have to believe this is the right thing to do...
MANOSABA-LABOURS_OF_HIRO_POWER.smartDesc: Whenever anyone plays an Attack card, the holder gains [gold]Majoka[/gold] equal to 10x [gold]Energy[/gold] spent.
MANOSABA-DEATH_LOOP_POWER.title: Death Loop
MANOSABA-DEATH_LOOP_POWER.description: When you die, heal HP based on your [gold]Majoka[/gold].
MANOSABA-DEATH_LOOP_POWER.smartDescripti: When you die, heal HP based on your [gold]Majoka[/gold].
MANOSABA-VOTE_POWER.title: Suspicion
MANOSABA-VOTE_POWER.description: Above 10 stacks, add a [gold]Bad End[/gold] to your hand each turn. You're the culprit, aren't you, Tohno Hanna!
MANOSABA-VOTE_POWER.smartDescription: Above 10 stacks, add a [gold]Bad End[/gold] to your hand each turn.
MANOSABA-INHIBITION_POWER.title: Inhibition
MANOSABA-INHIBITION_POWER.description: While you have Inhibition, [gold]Murderous Impulse[/gold] has no effect.
MANOSABA-INHIBITION_POWER.smartDescripti: While you have Inhibition, [gold]Murderous Impulse[/gold] has no effect.
MANOSABA-BURN_POWER.title: Burn
MANOSABA-BURN_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, take damage equal to your stacks and deal 10% less attack damage.
MANOSABA-BURN_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of your turn, take damage equal to your stacks and deal 10% less attack damage.
MANOSABA-PRISON_POWER.title: Witch Island Prison
MANOSABA-PRISON_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, gain [gold]Majoka[/gold] equal to your stacks.
MANOSABA-PRISON_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of your turn, gain [gold]Majoka[/gold] equal to your stacks.
MANOSABA-POTION_FACTORY_POWER.title: Potion Factory
MANOSABA-POTION_FACTORY_POWER.descriptio: At the start of your turn, randomly create advanced potions equal to your stacks.
MANOSABA-POTION_FACTORY_POWER.smartDescr: At the start of your turn, randomly create advanced potions equal to your stacks.
MANOSABA-IKITEYO_HIROCHAN_POWER.title: Live On, Hiro-chan
MANOSABA-EMA_DOG_ATTACK_POWER.title: Ema, Attack!
MANOSABA-EMA_DOG_ATTACK_POWER.descriptio: At the end of your turn, [gold]Sakuraba Ema?[/gold] deals damage to a random enemy equal to her current HP.
MANOSABA-EMA_DOG_ATTACK_POWER.smartDescr: At the end of your turn, [gold]Sakuraba Ema?[/gold] deals damage to a random enemy equal to her current HP.
MANOSABA-DOUBLE_SUICIDE_POWER.title: Lovers' Pact
MANOSABA-DOUBLE_SUICIDE_POWER.descriptio: Take 3 additional damage. At the end of the enemy turn, heal HP equal to a percentage of your stacks, then remove this power.
MANOSABA-DOUBLE_SUICIDE_POWER.smartDescr: Take extra damage; at the end of the enemy turn, heal by a percent of HP based on stacks and remove this power.
MANOSABA-PET_ENEMY_AI_POWER.title: Pseudo-Beast Painting
MANOSABA-PET_ENEMY_AI_POWER.description: Summoned monsters act in their original order (attacks and buffs/debuffs only). While one exists, the summoner has 1 less max energy.
MANOSABA-PET_ENEMY_AI_POWER.smartDescrip: Summoned monsters act in their original order (attacks and buffs/debuffs only). While one exists, the summoner has 1 less max energy.
MANOSABA-LIQUID_MANIPULATION_POWER.title: Liquid Manipulation
MANOSABA-LIQUID_MANIPULATION_POWER.descr: Gain damage reduction equal to your stacks as a percentage. Lose 1 stack each turn.
MANOSABA-LIQUID_MANIPULATION_POWER.smart: Gain damage reduction equal to your stacks as a percentage. Lose 1 stack each turn.
MANOSABA-SPACE_OUT_POWER.title: Space Out
MANOSABA-SPACE_OUT_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, if you have all six paint orb colors (Red, Orange, Yellow, Green, Blue, Purple), deal 50 damage to all enemies, then evoke all orbs. Otherwise, channel 1 missing color orb at random.
MANOSABA-SPACE_OUT_POWER.smartDescriptio: Start of turn: if all six paint colors are present, deal 50 to all enemies and evoke all orbs; otherwise channel a random missing color orb.
MANOSABA-QUICK_WIT_POWER.title: Quick Wit
MANOSABA-QUICK_WIT_POWER.description:
At the start of each turn, gain all of the following (values roll within each range):
Gain 1–3 Strength,
Gain −2–2 Dexterity,
HP changes by −10–+10,
All enemies gain 0–2 Vulnerable,
All enemies gain 0–2 Weak.
MANOSABA-QUICK_WIT_POWER.smartDescriptio: At the start of each turn, randomly shift Strength, Dexterity, and HP, and give all enemies Vulnerable and Weak.
MANOSABA-HANGING_KILL_POWER.title: Hanging Kill
MANOSABA-HANGING_KILL_POWER.description: All [gold]Hanging Kill[/gold] cards deal [blue]2[/blue]× damage to this enemy.
MANOSABA-HANGING_KILL_POWER.smartDescrip: All [gold]Hanging Kill[/gold] cards deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue]× damage to this enemy.
MANOSABA-LIFELONG_FRIEND_POWER.title: Star-Crossed
MANOSABA-LIFELONG_FRIEND_POWER.descripti:
At the start of your turn, lose 20 [gold]Majoka[/gold] and add a 0-cost [gold]Boulders[/gold] to your hand.
If your bonded partner dies, you die immediately.
MANOSABA-LIFELONG_FRIEND_POWER.smartDesc: Each turn, lose 20 Majoka and gain a 0-cost Boulders; you die if your partner dies.
MANOSABA-DATE_TIME_NO_MAJOKA_POWER.title: Date Time
MANOSABA-DATE_TIME_NO_MAJOKA_POWER.smart: You cannot gain Majoka this turn.
MANOSABA-FRIENDLY_POWER.title: Affinity
MANOSABA-MEMORY_SHARING_POWER.title: Memory Sharing
MANOSABA-MEMORY_SHARING_POWER.descriptio: At the start of each turn, gain a random teammate card based on your [gold]Majoka[/gold].
MANOSABA-MEMORY_SHARING_POWER.smartDescr: At the start of each turn, gain a random teammate card.
MANOSABA-MARGO_PUPPET_POWER.title: Puppet Mimicry
MANOSABA-MARGO_PUPPET_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, move a random card with the [gold]Puppet[/gold] tag from your discard pile to your hand.
MANOSABA-MARGO_PUPPET_POWER.smartDescrip: At the start of your turn, move a random card with the [gold]Puppet[/gold] tag from your [gold]discard pile[/gold] to your hand.
MANOSABA-EMA_PUPPET_POWER.title: Puppet Magic
MANOSABA-EMA_PUPPET_POWER.description: Whenever you play a card with the [gold]Puppet[/gold] tag, deal [blue]{IfUpgraded:show:12|9}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies. Stacks increase the damage.
MANOSABA-EMA_PUPPET_POWER.smartDescripti: Whenever you play a card with the [gold]Puppet[/gold] tag, deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
MANOSABA-ALISA_PUPPET_COLLECTION_POWER.d: A tiny Alisa puppet floats beside you. If you can gather all of them...

MANOSABA-HANNA_PUPPET_POWER.title: Flying Magic
MANOSABA-HANNA_PUPPET_POWER.description: Receives [gold]50%[/gold] less attack damage from Attacks for one turn.
MANOSABA-HANNA_PUPPET_POWER.smartDescrip: Receives [blue]{DamageDecrease}%[/blue] less attack damage from Attacks for one turn.

MANOSABA-LEIA_PUPPET_POWER.title: Leia's Royalties
MANOSABA-LEIA_PUPPET_POWER.description: At the end of combat, gain [blue]{IfUpgraded:show:15|10}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Stacks increase the gold gained.
MANOSABA-LEIA_PUPPET_POWER.smartDescript: At the end of combat, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold].

MANOSABA-SHERRY_PUPPET_POWER.title: Brute Magic
MANOSABA-SHERRY_PUPPET_POWER.description: This turn, your next Attack card is played one extra time.
MANOSABA-SHERRY_PUPPET_POWER.smartDescri: This turn, your next [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Attack card(s) is played one extra time.
MANOSABA-PUPPET_COLLECTION_SUMMARY_POWER: Stacks equal the number of different [gold]Puppet[/gold] companions you have collected this combat (each character counts once). At [blue]13[/blue] stacks, you win the combat at the end of your turn.
